[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111110101 7
1 000111111 6
2 111111011 8
3 111111100 7
4 101111011 7
5 010010001 3
6 000010101 3
7 110111010 6

01 10 111111111 a
12 21 111111111 a
23 32 111110011 7
34 43 010010101 4
45 54 110111111 8
56 65 111111110 8
67 76 101111110 7
70 07 101111011 7 match 4

02 20 101111011 7 match 4
13 31 010011101 5
24 42 101110111 7
35 53 110111011 7
46 64 101110101 6
57 75 110111010 6 match 7
60 06 101111111 8
71 17 010111110 6

14 41 010011101 5
25 52 111111011 8 match 2
36 63 111110101 7 match 0
47 74 000111111 6 match 1

61 16 111111100 7 match 3
72 27 101111011 7 match 4
